content: Phase 2.5 — Fix clippy, add M1/M2/M3 validations, add arb-db + arb-risk test suites. Engineering-only task, delegating to Backend Dev via Engineering Lead shortcut.
Delegating all 7 fixes to Backend Dev agent. Domain adapted to projects/arbitrage-trader/crates/**. Single-worker shortcut — no lead intermediary needed for fully-specified bug-fix task.

All 7 fixes applied. Fix 1: removed never-loop in polymarket connector. Fix 2: dead_code annotations, redundant closure, is_multiple_of. Fix 3: price validation in both connectors. Fix 4: market_id validation in place_limit_order. Fix 5: WS staleness detection with 30s ping + 90s timeout in both WS handlers. Fix 6: 15 arb-db tests (CRUD for all entities + FK constraint). Fix 7: 14 arb-risk tests (all pre_trade_check paths + exposure tracker + config defaults).
Phase 2.5 gate PASSED. Clippy: zero errors/warnings. Tests: 97 passing (15 db + 38 kalshi + 27 polymarket + 14 risk + 3 types). Build: clean.
